prompt_description: Get important AlmaPet alerts on this device.
preparing_sw: Preparing the service worker… wait a few seconds or reload the page.
active_description: You’ll receive catalog and key event alerts on this device.
permission_denied: Notifications are blocked in the browser. Enable them in the site settings.
brave_local_hint: Brave may block push locally. Use Chrome, Edge or Firefox, or disable Shields for this site.
